gui.bubbleshield.title: Bubble Shield Projector
gui.bubbleshield.name: Name...
gui.bubbleshield.name.title: Shield Name
gui.bubbleshield.shape.tooltip: Shield shape. A ring has an open central hole.
gui.bubbleshield.beam.tooltip: Central energy beam rising through the bubble. Auto picks a style matching the effect.
gui.bubbleshield.color.title: Shield Color
gui.bubbleshield.color.note: Recolors the bubble, HUD bar, particles and boss bar. The in-bubble screen effect keeps the effect's own colors.
command.bubbleshield.set.no_projector: No bubble shield projector within %s blocks
command.bubbleshield.set.not_owner: You do not own the nearest projector
advancements.bubbleshield.root.title: Bubble Shield
advancements.bubbleshield.maximalist.des: Activate a bubble shield with a diameter of 200 blocks
advancements.bubbleshield.friend_zone.de: Whitelist another player on your shield
advancements.bubbleshield.christened.des: Give your shield a custom name
Recolor your shield with a dye color
advancements.bubbleshield.linked_up.desc: Have two of your shields split damage through a resonance link
